Gets a MapSourceLocation from a path name.

Documentation.Summary: Gets a <see cref="T:Sandbox.ActionGraphs.MapSourceLocation" /> from a path name.

Params.mapPathName: Project-relative map path ending with ".vmap" or ".vpk".

ConstructorArguments: Source location for action graphs that belong to a Hammer map. This is used for stack traces, and for knowing which map to save when editing a graph.

Documentation.Summary:
Source location for action graphs that belong to a Hammer map. This is used for stack
traces, and for knowing which map to save when editing a graph.

Source location for action graphs that belong to a <see cref="T:Sandbox.GameResource" />.
These can include scenes and prefabs, or custom resources. This is used for stack
traces, and for knowing which asset to save when editing a graph.
